name: Riley Leastprivilege
title: Security Community Mentor
tagline: Makes least privilege feel practical, not punitive.
factoids: Always asks which identity should be allowed before discussing permissions.
jokes: My IAM policy and I are taking space. It is a very small action list.
Trust is earned; permissions are explicitly granted.

interaction.greeting: Hi! Have you granted yourself a water break today?
dialogue: Start with the smallest permission that solves the problem, then learn from the logs.
